ComfyUI workflow node mapping is invalid: ComfyUI workflow node mapping is invalid. Please update the workflow node IDs to match the current workflow.
Configured ComfyUI workflow node IDs do: Configured ComfyUI workflow node IDs do not exist in the current workflow: {{mappings}}. Please update the workflow node mapping and try again.
Connection to the image generation servi: Connection to the image generation service failed. Please check that the service is running and the URL is reachable.
Saved but not verified yet. Open edit an: Saved but not verified yet. Open edit and click "Verify Connection".
connection.error.check_key_matches_url: Check whether the API key is correct and make sure it matches the current API base URL before trying again.
Compatibility mode works with a wider ra: Compatibility mode works with a wider range of models by calling tools once before execution. Native mode leverages the model’s built-in tool-calling capabilities, but requires the model to inherently support this feature.
Compatibility mode uses prompt-based too: Compatibility mode uses prompt-based tool orchestration, works with a wider range of models, but may be slower.
Force mode connections do not support Re: Force mode connections do not support Responses API auto-routing.
Force mode uses the exact URL and will n: Force mode uses the exact URL and will not auto-append /chat/completions or /v1.
Force mode uses the exact URL and will not auto-append /search or /extract.
Leave empty if you do not want a global: Leave empty if you do not want a global default system prompt.
Leave empty to inherit the global defaul: Leave empty to inherit the global default system prompt. Enter text here to override it only for the current chat.
Shows all currently available image mode: Shows all currently available image models for this engine. The suffix in the name indicates the source channel.
Your previous image model source is unav: Your previous image model source is unavailable. Switched to another available source for the same model.
Model returned an empty response. Try re: Model returned an empty response. Try resending or switching models.
Upstream image generation completed but: The image service returned success, but no image data was included.
This model only accepts aspect ratio req: This model only accepts aspect ratio requests. {{size}} will be sent as {{ratio}}, not as an exact pixel size.
error.reason.tool_no_final_answer: Tool execution completed but no final answer generated
error.reason.api_auth_error: API key invalid or insufficient permissions
error.reason.api_model_not_found: Model not found or not available
error.reason.api_quota_exceeded: API quota or credit limit exceeded
error.reason.api_rate_limit: Too many requests in a short time
error.reason.api_unsupported_params: Request contains tools or parameters not supported by upstream
error.reason.api_context_too_long: Context exceeds the limit supported by the relay or model
error.reason.api_request_interface_misma: The request fields or parameters do not match the target interface
error.reason.api_request_model_mismatch: Some parameters only apply to a different interface or model family
error.reason.api_request_feature_not_sup: Tool, streaming, or multimodal settings are not accepted by the current interface
error.reason.api_proxy_schema_mismatch: The proxy or compatibility layer is not fully aligned with the upstream schema
error.title.request_incompatible: The request included parameters that are incompatible with the current interface and was rejected (HTTP {{status}})
error.title.request_incompatible_no_stat: The request included parameters that are incompatible with the current interface and was rejected
error.title.auth_error: Upstream authentication failed and the request was rejected (HTTP {{status}})
error.title.auth_error_no_status: Upstream authentication failed and the request was rejected
error.title.account_resource_not_found: The current upstream account cannot access this model or function.
error.title.model_not_found: The upstream model or endpoint was not found and the request failed (HTTP {{status}})
error.title.model_not_found_no_status: The upstream model or endpoint was not found and the request failed
error.title.rate_limited: The request was rate-limited by the upstream service (HTTP {{status}})
error.title.rate_limited_no_status: The request was rate-limited by the upstream service
error.title.timeout: The upstream service timed out and the request failed (HTTP {{status}})
error.title.timeout_no_status: The upstream service timed out and the request failed
error.title.upstream_service_error: The upstream service returned an error and the request failed (HTTP {{status}})
error.title.upstream_service_error_no_st: The upstream service returned an error and the request failed
error.body.request_incompatible: The upstream interface rejected this request. This looks more like a mismatch between the request fields, parameters, or calling style and the current interface.
error.body.auth_error: The request reached the upstream service, but authentication did not pass. Check the API key, permissions, or connection settings.
error.body.account_resource_not_found: The upstream service indicates that this account has not been granted access to the target model or function, or that it is outside the account's available catalog. Check the provider console for model entitlement, quota, or regional availability.
error.body.model_not_found: The upstream could not find the current model or target endpoint. Check the model name, connection settings, or whether the model is available upstream.
error.body.rate_limited: The upstream refused additional requests in a short period. This is usually related to rate limits, quota, or concurrency controls.
error.body.timeout: The request was sent, but the upstream did not complete the response in time.
error.body.upstream_service_error: The upstream returned an abnormal response. The problem may come from the upstream service itself, proxy forwarding, or an imperfect match between the request and upstream capabilities.
error.detail.responses_api_include_usage: This is an API compatibility issue, not a problem with the message content you sent.
error.title.upstream_invalid_parameter: The upstream rejected this request parameter: {{param}}.
error.title.responses_api_invalid_parame: This connection is using the Responses API, but the request included an unsupported parameter: {{param}}.
error.title.responses_api_request_failed: The upstream model service returned an error and the Responses API request failed.
The upstream model service returned an error and the Responses API request failed (HTTP {{status}}).
error.body.responses_api_min_value: The parameter {{param}} is below the minimum allowed by the upstream service. Expected at least {{expected}}, but got {{actual}}.
error.suggestion.retry_or_switch: Try resending the message, or switch to a different model.
error.suggestion.retry_narrow_or_switch: Try again, narrow the question scope, or switch to a different model.
error.suggestion.check_api_key: Check your API key configuration and try again.
error.suggestion.check_request_compatibi: Check whether the request shape, connection type, and model capabilities match. If needed, switch interfaces or remove incompatible parameters before trying again.
error.suggestion.check_responses_api_com: Check the connection settings. If the upstream is OpenAI's Responses API, do not send streaming parameters that only apply to Chat Completions.
error.suggestion.wait_retry: Wait a moment, then try again.
Model order controls how models are list: Model order controls how models are listed across the app.
Native mode uses the model's built-in to: Native mode uses the model's built-in tool-calling capabilities for faster, more reliable multi-step operations. Requires a strong tool-capable model.
Off mode disables tool calling while kee: Off mode disables tool calling while keeping your selected MCP / OpenAPI tools configured.
Off mode disables tool calling while keeping your selected tools configured.
Only alphanumeric characters and undersc: Only alphanumeric characters and underscores are allowed in the id.
The id must start with a letter or under: The id must start with a letter or underscore, and may contain only letters, numbers, and underscores.
Oops! The URL you provided is invalid. P: Oops! The URL you provided is invalid. Please double-check and try again.
This id is already registered. Please ch: This id is already registered. Please choose another id.
Code formatting is unavailable because t: Code formatting is unavailable because the optional dependency black is not installed. You can still save normally, or install it later if you want manual formatting.
Choose how streaming chat messages appea: Choose how streaming chat messages appear
Keep the viewport pinned to the latest t: Keep the viewport pinned to the latest tokens while the reply is streaming
Settings were saved, but the model list: Settings were saved, but the model list could not be refreshed. Please check whether the image generation service is running and reachable.
Current effective content comes from the: Current effective content comes from the global default system prompt.
No global default system prompt is set y: No global default system prompt is set yet.
New chats without a custom current-chat: New chats without a custom current-chat system prompt will inherit this setting. A current chat system prompt can override it.
This default is not copied into each cha: This default is not copied into each chat. Chats without an override inherit it dynamically.
Tavily API Key is required when Tavily s: Tavily API Key is required when Tavily search or loader is enabled.
Tavily URL accepts a base URL or the mat: Tavily URL accepts a base URL or the matching endpoint. Add # at the end to use the exact URL without auto-appending /search or /extract.
Tavily {{endpoint}} URL cannot end with: Tavily {{endpoint}} URL cannot end with {{wrongSuffix}}. Use a base URL or an endpoint ending with {{endpointSuffix}}.
Tavily {{endpoint}} URL must start with: Tavily {{endpoint}} URL must start with http:// or https://.
This provider does not expose a model li: This provider does not expose a model list. Add model IDs manually below.
If the model is not listed, search and u: If the model is not listed, search and use its exact model ID directly.
This stdio MCP uses a Git source. The cu: This stdio MCP uses a Git source. The current runtime has uv/uvx, but is missing git. Switch to the official main image with git included, or install git in the container and verify again.
Choose the search engine used by HaloWeb: Choose the search engine used by HaloWebUI web search.
Configure the parameters required by the: Configure the parameters required by the selected search engine.
URL will be auto-normalized (e.g. auto-a: URL will be auto-normalized (e.g. auto-append /v1). Add # at the end to disable auto-normalization and use exact URL.
Custom headers override this mode. For m: Custom headers override this mode. For most Gemini endpoints, x-goog-api-key is recommended.
简要描述此服务器的用途: Briefly describe the purpose of this server
自定义请求头会覆盖同名自动认证头。: Custom headers override automatic auth headers with the same name.
适用于 x-consumer-api-key、x-api-key、Authori: Use this for provider-specific headers like x-consumer-api-key, x-api-key, or Authorization.
该请求头由 HaloWebUI 管理，不能自定义：{{key}}: HaloWebUI manages this header and it cannot be customized: {{key}}
请求头名称和值不能包含换行: Header names and values cannot contain line breaks
适用于 x-consumer-api-key、x-api-key 或供应商要求的: Use this for x-consumer-api-key, x-api-key, or any provider-required custom header
用于不需要令牌的本地或内部 MCP 服务器: Use this for local or internal MCP servers that do not require a token
用于需要 API 令牌的服务器: Use this for servers that require an API token
用于带有身份提供商流程的企业级部署: Use this for enterprise deployments with an identity provider flow
仅支持 Streamable HTTP 传输方式: Only Streamable HTTP transport is supported

This model does not support archive file: This model does not support archive files. Please extract and upload files individually.

Upload a supported text or document file: Upload a supported text or document file instead.
The server is missing the text encoding: The server is missing the text encoding detection dependency needed to read this file.
Ask an administrator to update the docum: Ask an administrator to update the document parsing dependencies, then try again.
The file could not be read as a supporte: The file could not be read as a supported text document. It may be binary data, an archive, or use an unsupported encoding.

No embedding model is available for docu: No embedding model is available for document retrieval.
Go to /settings/documents to configure a: Go to /settings/documents to configure an embedding model, or enable "Bypass Embedding and Retrieval".
Ask an administrator to configure docume: Ask an administrator to configure document retrieval, or enable "Bypass Embedding and Retrieval" if you have admin access.
The embedding model service rejected the: The embedding model service rejected the request while indexing this file.
Check the embedding model credentials an: Check the embedding model credentials and endpoint in /settings/documents, then try again.
Ask an administrator to check the docume: Ask an administrator to check the document retrieval credentials.
The embedding model service could not be: The embedding model service could not be reached while indexing this file.
Check the embedding model endpoint or ne: Check the embedding model endpoint or network connection in /settings/documents, then try again.
Ask an administrator to check the docume: Ask an administrator to check the document retrieval service endpoint.
The system could not build retrieval ind: The system could not build retrieval indexes for this file.
A single text chunk was rejected by the: A single text chunk was rejected by the embedding service even after splitting the batch to one item. This usually means the chunk exceeds the embedding model's input token limit.
Go to Admin → Settings → Documents, redu: Go to Admin → Settings → Documents, reduce Chunk Size (and optionally Chunk Overlap), then re-upload this file.
Ask an administrator to reduce the docum: Ask an administrator to reduce the document chunk size.
The system tried the current document pa: The system tried the current document parser first, then a backup parser, but neither could read this file.
Check the selected document parser, requ: Check the selected document parser, required credentials such as API keys, and local parsing dependencies. If you do not have access, ask an administrator to review them, then try again.
The file could not be parsed or indexed: The file could not be parsed or indexed successfully.
Try again with a supported file, or cont: Try again with a supported file, or contact an administrator.
